label: Ideo story pattern
description: Defines a pattern for generating ideoligion description text. Each pattern names grammar segments that the description system expands in sequence, with optional inline grammar rules.

segments.label: Segments
segments.description: Ordered list of grammar slot names (e.g. intro, creation, episode) that the description resolver expands in sequence. At least one segment is required. Entries are grammar keyword names, not translated text.

noCapitalizeFirstSentence.label: No capitalize first sentence
noCapitalizeFirstSentence.description: Segment keyword names drawn from segments whose expanded text should not have its first character capitalized. Optional.

rules.label: Rules
rules.description: Inline grammar rules available when expanding this pattern's segments. Reuses the shared RulePack schema.

basic-ideo-story-pattern.label: Basic ideo story pattern
basic-ideo-story-pattern.description: Minimal IdeoStoryPatternDef with defName, label, description, and a segments list containing one placeholder segment.
